description: UNSTRING inside PERFORM VARYING loop — splits CSV 'A,B' into WS-P1 and WS-P2
notes: PERFORM VARYING WS-I FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-I > 1 runs exactly once (I=1, then I=2 > 1 exits). Body executes UNSTRING WS-CSV DELIMITED ',' INTO WS-P1 WS-P2. Result: WS-P1='A', WS-P2='B'. Tests UNSTRING verb nested inside PERFORM VARYING loop body.
